mapper.select: select tt.topic_name from fr_special fsl left join tb_topic tt on fsl.topic_id = tt.topic_id where special_id = #{specialId}

select ti.thumb_url, ti.image_name fileName, fs.group_code, fs.wax_code, fs.animal_code, fs.gender_flag, fs.organs, fs.process_flag, su.user_name createUser, fs.create_time, fs.slide_id, fs.analyze_status from fr_slide fs left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id
fs.special_id = #{specialId} and fs.del_flag='0'
and ti.image_name like concat('%',#{fileName},'%')
and fs.analyze_status = #{analyzeStatus}
and fs.process_flag = #{processFlag}
and su.user_name like concat('%',#{createBy},'%')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{createTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{createTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fs.create_time desc

SELECT t2.file_name, t1.* FROM fr_slide t1 LEFT JOIN tb_image t2 on t1.image_id = t2.image_id
AND t1.special_id = #{specialId}
AND t1.animal_code like concat('%', #{animalCode}, '%')
AND t2.file_name like concat('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND t1.check_status = 3
AND (t1.organs like concat('%', #{categoryName}, '%')
or t1.slide_id in
#{item}
)
AND t1.process_flag = 2
AND t1.analyze_status = '0' AND t1.animal_code is not NULL AND t1.check_status > 0 ORDER BY t1.animal_code,t1.animal_check_status desc,t1.check_status desc,t2.file_name

select s.slide_id, s.special_id, s.image_id, s.group_code, s.wax_code, s.animal_code, s.gender_flag, s.organs, s.process_flag, s.check_status, s.check_by, s.check_time, s.initiate_by, s.initiate_time, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, m.image_id, m.thumb_url, m.image_path, m.format, m.width, m.height, m.resolution_x, m.resolution_y, m.source_lens, m.image_path, m.thumb_url, m.image_name from fr_slide s left join tb_image m on m.image_id = s.image_id
s.slide_id = #{slideId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

select fss.single_id,fss.slide_id,fss.thumb_url, fss.category_id, ti.file_name, fss.forecast_status, fss.diagnosis_status from fr_single_slide fss left join fr_slide fs on fss.slide_id = fs.slide_id left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id where fss.slide_id =#{slideId}

select fss.category_id, fc.organ_name, fc.organ_en from fr_single_slide fss left join fr_category fc on fss.category_id = fc.category_id left join fr_slide fs on fs.slide_id = fss.slide_id where fs.special_id = #{specialId} and fc.category_id is not null group by fss.category_id, fc.organ_name, fc.organ_en
